_comment: CMA-ES seed (warm-start / anchor) configs for the S5-symmetric protocol (paper/review/S5_SYMMETRIC_PROTOCOL.md S.D.2). Each arm is seeded at its existing 8M MODEL_CONFIG center from experiments/expressivity_tasks/run_separation_suite.py:77-112 (depth=4, H=32, N=32; FLA dim=640, M2RNN-paper dim=608). lr seeded at the probe's hand-set 3e-4. E88 additionally seeds the two BL-1 structural knobs at the current 8M-probe configuration (linear_state=0 i.e. tanh ON; use_gate=1 i.e. HybridLadderLM default), which CMA then searches symmetrically on S5. Loaded by load_anchor_configs(); use with --anchor_only_cmaes so the only warm start per arm is its seed.
